docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF Q-TECH REPAIR INC IS PRESENT . DEFENDANT IAA IS PRESENT AND APPEARING IN COURT IS VONELA KHAMSOUKPOS. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF Q-TECH AUTO REPAIR INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IAA (INSURANCE AUTO AUCTIONS CORP) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,345.00 FILED BY Q-TECH AUTO REPAIR INC AS TO DEFENDANT IAA (INSURANCE AUTO AUCTIONS CORP) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-05-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IAA (INSURANCE AUTO AUCTIONS CORP)
